modules.selection_trigger: cover slide with one primary narrative claim and one product proof object
modules.composition_contract: one large typographic field plus one asymmetric native proof object
modules.typography_contract: headline first-read at thumbnail scale; support copy below 18 words
modules.spacing_contract: headline/proof field must leave visible breathing room and avoid equal-card grids
modules.asset_contract: native PPT shapes or sanitized/generated product object only
modules.fallback_contract: if headline exceeds two lines, switch to dense_evidence_compression instead of shrinking below legible size

modules.selection_trigger: proof or setup slide with a visible product/system state change
modules.composition_contract: one product surface owns the slide with secondary labels around it
modules.typography_contract: title below 10 words; labels stay noun-phrase length
modules.spacing_contract: product surface must be visually larger than any supporting text block
modules.asset_contract: native editable product-state abstraction; no copied screenshot
modules.fallback_contract: if product state cannot be represented natively, use dense_evidence_compression with one abstract proof object

modules.selection_trigger: contrast slide comparing old output, selector intervention, and improved result
modules.composition_contract: asymmetric route from before to after with one visible turn point
modules.typography_contract: delta headline plus compact before/after labels
modules.fallback_contract: if before/after text is too long, compress each side to one label and move detail to trace

modules.selection_trigger: climax slide with one primary business, product, or release outcome
modules.composition_contract: one metric or product state becomes the hero object
modules.typography_contract: metric phrase first, consequence line second, no dense proof stack
modules.spacing_contract: hero object or metric owns at least one third of the canvas
modules.asset_contract: native metric object or generated abstract product-state object
modules.fallback_contract: if there are multiple competing outcomes, choose dense_evidence_compression before climax

modules.selection_trigger: close slide that must preserve internal release gate without showing diagnostic clutter
modules.composition_contract: quiet final claim with one restrained handoff object
modules.typography_contract: closing claim under 12 words and one short release note
modules.spacing_contract: large calm field with no table or checklist
modules.asset_contract: native release-state object or simple handoff marker
modules.fallback_contract: if release reasons are required, link them in viewer/result docs rather than adding slide clutter

modules.selection_trigger: content burden exceeds the selected editorial module text or object budget
modules.composition_contract: compress evidence to one takeaway, grouped labels, and one proof object
modules.typography_contract: no paragraph below thumbnail-readable size; long evidence becomes labels and trace ids
modules.spacing_contract: cap repeated cards and keep one dominant read path
modules.fallback_contract: if compression still exceeds budget, split content before generation rather than shrinking text
